subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Tabib
subcodes.first_line: That which thou didst mention concerning the upheaval and dissension in Persia - this is what We had promised in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینکه در باره انقلاب و اختلاف ایران مذکور نموده بودید هذا ما وعدنا به فی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @petitions to authorities, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
